channel.title: Hand-Ported on WFM Labs Knowledge Wiki
channel.description: Recent content in Hand-Ported on WFM Labs Knowledge Wiki

item.title: Event Management
item.description:
Event Management is a systematic methodology for detecting, classifying, responding to, and resolving operational incidents that impact contact center performance and customer service delivery. Event management serves as the foundational process for Resource Optimization Center (ROC) operations, providing structured protocols for maintaining service level objectives and ensuring consistent operational excellence.

The event management framework enables organizations to transition from reactive incident response to proactive operational intelligence by establishing standardized procedures for incident classification, response coordination, and performance recovery. This systematic approach ensures consistent analysis and continuous improvement of operational capabilities while maintaining clear communication channels across all organizational levels.
